topics: and applications of mechatronic systems. Interdisciplinary approach
Mechanical Components Introduction to mechanical components
and mechanical structures. Selection criteria and compatibility considerations. Electronic Components Overview of electronic components
and signal conditioning circuits. Interfacing techniques and circuit design for integration
Modeling Techniques Introduction to modeling methodologies
and control subsystems. Simulation Tools Hands-on experience with simulation software (e.g

Control Theory Basics Introduction to control systems

and system stability. Design considerations for mechatronic control systems. Implementation and Testing Practical implementation of control algorithms on hardware platforms. Testing and validation of mechatronic systems using simulation and real-world experiments
